data.title: Duro Felguera Resolves Djelfa Power Plant Dispute with Sonelgaz
data.description:
An update from Duro Felguera ( (ES:MDF) ) is now available.

Duro Felguera has signed a memorandum of understanding with Sonelgaz-Production d’Electricité and China Power Engineering & Consulting Group to amicably resolve a contract and related disputes concerning the Djelfa power plant in Algeria. This agreement aims to ensure the completion of the power plant’s construction and settle all ongoing litigations, with the final terms to be executed within a month.

More about Duro Felguera

Duro Felguera is a company involved in the construction and engineering industry, focusing on large-scale infrastructure projects such as power plants.

data.title: Otsuka Holdings Completes Share Repurchase and Announces Treasury Stock Cancellation
data.description:
An update from Otsuka Holdings Co ( (JP:4578) ) is now available.

Otsuka Holdings Co., Ltd. has completed a significant share repurchase and announced the cancellation of a portion of its treasury stock. This strategic move, involving the repurchase of over 9 million shares, aims to optimize the company’s capital structure and potentially enhance shareholder value.

data.title: Centrex Limited Selects PRL Global Ltd for Exclusive Due Diligence
data.description:
Centrex Limited ( (AU:CXM) ) has provided an update.

Centrex Limited, currently under administration, has announced that PRL Global Ltd has been selected as the preferred bidder for the potential sale or recapitalization of the company. The decision follows discussions with shortlisted bidders, and PRL Global Ltd will now enter a 45-day exclusive due diligence period. This development could significantly impact Centrex Limited’s future operations and market positioning, with further updates expected after the due diligence period concludes.

More about Centrex Limited

Centrex Limited operates in the industry of resource exploration and development, with a focus on agricultural and mineral projects. The company, along with its subsidiary Agriflex Pty Ltd, is involved in the production and supply of agricultural products.

data.title: Emperador Inc. Announces By-Law Amendments to Enhance Governance
data.description:
Emperador Inc. ( (SG:EMI) ) has issued an update.

Emperador Inc. has announced amendments to its Amended By-Laws, approved by the Board of Directors. These changes include setting the annual stockholders’ meeting on the last Wednesday of June, creating an Executive Committee to handle daily operations, and establishing the honorary title of ‘Chairman Emeritus’ for distinguished service. These amendments aim to enhance operational efficiency and governance, potentially impacting the company’s strategic direction and stakeholder engagement.

More about Emperador Inc.

Emperador Inc. is a company based in the Philippines, primarily involved in the production and distribution of alcoholic beverages. It operates within the beverage industry, focusing on spirits and wines, and is known for its strong market presence in both local and international markets.

data.title: Deterra Royalties Ltd Appoints New Director with Significant Shareholding
data.description:
Deterra Royalties Ltd ( (AU:DRR) ) has provided an update.

Deterra Royalties Ltd has announced the appointment of Alexander Morrison as a director, effective April 16, 2025. Mr. Morrison holds 22,000 ordinary fully paid shares through the Alexander and Roberta Morrison Revocable Living Trust, indicating a significant personal investment in the company. This appointment could potentially influence the company’s strategic direction and stakeholder interests, given Mr. Morrison’s vested interest in the company’s performance.

More about Deterra Royalties Ltd

Deterra Royalties Ltd operates in the mining industry, focusing on the management and acquisition of royalty interests. The company primarily deals with mineral royalties, providing a financial interest in the production or revenue from mining operations.

data.title: Electrum Discovery Launches Spring 2025 Field Program at Timok East
data.description:
Electrum Discovery ( (TSE:ELY) ) has provided an announcement.

Electrum Discovery Corp. has announced the launch of its Spring 2025 field program at the Timok East Copper-Gold Project in Serbia, aimed at refining high-priority targets through geological mapping, geophysical surveys, and geochemical sampling. The company has confirmed the extension of surface copper mineralization over a 1.7-kilometer strike zone at the Northern Skarn target, which aligns with its broader strategy to advance exploration and unlock the porphyry potential of the Timok Magmatic Complex. This initiative is expected to enhance Electrum’s geological model and guide future drilling programs, potentially impacting the company’s market positioning and stakeholder interests.

More about Electrum Discovery

Electrum Discovery Corp. operates in the mining industry, focusing on the exploration and development of copper and gold resources. The company is primarily engaged in advancing its projects in the Timok East Copper-Gold Project located in eastern Serbia, with a strategic emphasis on unlocking district-scale copper-gold potential.

YTD Price Performance: -57.14%

Average Trading Volume: 457,839

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$5.91M

data.title: Fujikura Ltd. Settles Lawsuit with Mitsubishi Electric
data.description:
Fujikura Ltd ( (JP:5803) ) has issued an announcement.

Fujikura Ltd. has settled a damages lawsuit with Mitsubishi Electric Corporation concerning special electronic cables, agreeing to pay 4.8 billion yen. This settlement will be recorded as an extraordinary loss in Fujikura’s financial statements for the fiscal year ended March 31, 2025, but will not affect the company’s consolidated financial forecasts.

More about Fujikura Ltd

Fujikura Ltd. operates in the electronics industry, specializing in the production of electronic cables and related products. The company focuses on delivering high-quality electronic components to various sectors, including telecommunications and energy.

data.title: Glencore Advances Share Buyback Program with Latest Purchase
data.description:
Glencore ( (GB:GLEN) ) has provided an update.

Glencore PLC has announced the purchase of 3.5 million of its ordinary shares on the London Stock Exchange as part of its ongoing share buyback program. This transaction, executed by Citigroup Global Markets Limited, is intended to enhance shareholder value and manage the company’s capital structure, with the repurchased shares held in treasury. The buyback program, which aims to be completed by August 2025, reflects Glencore’s strategic financial management and could influence shareholder voting rights and market perceptions.

Spark’s Take on GB:GLEN Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, GB:GLEN is a Neutral.

Glencore’s overall stock score reflects a cautious outlook due to mixed financial performance and bearish technical indicators. Strong dividend yield and positive earnings call sentiment provide some offset to profitability challenges and negative market momentum.

To see Spark’s full report on GB:GLEN stock, click here.

More about Glencore

Glencore PLC is a prominent player in the commodities industry, primarily engaged in the production and marketing of metals and minerals, energy products, and agricultural products. The company operates globally, focusing on resource extraction, processing, and trading, with a significant presence in the mining sector.

data.title: Life Science REIT Initiates Strategic Review Amid Market Challenges
data.description:
Life Science Reit Plc ( (GB:LABS) ) just unveiled an update.

Life Science REIT plc has announced a strategic review to explore options for maximizing shareholder value, prompted by challenges such as high inflation, elevated interest rates, and low liquidity, which have led to a prolonged discount in share price. Despite these challenges, the company has made progress in leasing activities and cost-saving measures, with a focus on capturing rental growth and completing development projects, while future dividends are suspended pending the review’s outcome.

More about Life Science Reit Plc

Life Science REIT plc is a specialist property business focused on the UK’s growing life science sector. The company operates a portfolio of assets located in the ‘Golden Triangle’ of research and development hubs in Oxford, Cambridge, and London’s Knowledge Quarter. Life Science REIT is listed on the Main Market of the London Stock Exchange under the ticker LABS.
